title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: the self-hosted LLM runner that lets you pull, run and chat with models like Llama-2, Mistral, Gemma locally via a simple CLI and REST API.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python library for Ollama: chat, embed, pull, list models with a few lines of code.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node & browsers; same API surface as the Python lib.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration package providing Ollama LLM and embeddings components.

title: ollama-webui (ollama-webui/ollama-webui)
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (chat UI, model management, multi-user, dark mode).

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama with synchronous & asynchronous APIs and streaming support.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Community-maintained Ruby gem for interacting with the Ollama server.

title: ollama-cli (go-llama)
summary: Unofficial Go CLI wrapper around Ollama’s REST API with extra helpers and TUI mode.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that brings local Ollama models into GitHub Copilot’s sidebar chat.

title: ollama-docker
summary: Official Docker image and compose examples for running Ollama containerized with GPU support.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Community Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes with autoscaling and PVC support.

title: ollama-chat (React)
summary: Minimal React chat app example using the Ollama JavaScript client and TailwindCSS.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack 2.0 integration offering OllamaGenerator and OllamaTextEmbedder components.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: .NET client for Ollama with async streaming and strongly-typed request/response models.

title: ollama-dagger
summary: Dagger module that spins up an Ollama service with a chosen model for CI pipelines.

title: ollama-n8n-node
summary: n8n community node to call Ollama chat completions inside no-code workflows.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Rust crate providing async wrappers over Ollama’s REST endpoints using reqwest.

title: ollama-zig
summary: Zig client library for Ollama with build.zig integration for easy dependency management.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin that adds a local AI assistant sidebar powered by any Ollama model.

title: ollama-slack-bot
summary: Lightweight Slack bot server that answers channel mentions using an Ollama backend.
